data.content: Shipment complete. Feature branch work/foolery-1f10-concurrent-fix was already merged to main (bc1963b82eca) and pushed to origin/main. CI passed: both CI and Coverage Badge workflows succeeded. Changes include: (1) JSONL-based agent outcome stats tracking in .foolery-logs/agent-success-rates.jsonl with concurrent session safety via atomic appendFile, (2) error exit handling with rollback of action states and retry with different agent via pool exclusion.
